description: Shared definitions for the Byte File Format (bff): colors, frames, transforms, and the renderable object variants. Because Lexicon has no float primitive, float-valued scalars and float-array entries are typed as `unknown`; consumers must enforce ranges (color channels and opacity in [0.0, 1.0], size/padding > 0, etc.). The bff `type` discriminator is replaced by atproto's `$type` when records are serialized.

color.description: RGBA color expressed as four floats in [0.0, 1.0]: [R, G, B, A].

items.description: Encoded as a decimal string because Lexicon lacks a float primitive.

frame.description: Position and size of an object: [X, Y, WIDTH, HEIGHT] in points on the 324x570 stage.

items.description: Encoded as a decimal string because Lexicon lacks a float primitive.

transformRow.description: One row of a 3x2 affine transform: [A, B] (or [C, D], or [TX, TY]).

items.description: Encoded as a decimal string because Lexicon lacks a float primitive.

transform.description: Top two rows of a 3x3 affine transformation matrix applied after `frame` is set: [[A, B], [C, D], [TX, TY]].

effect.description: Animation effect id applied to an object and looped indefinitely. Multiple effects can be combined.

textAttribute.description: A styling attribute applied to a substring of paragraph text.

paragraph.description: The Paragraph object renders text that flows and automatically wraps inside its frame. Best for text longer than 1-3 words.

name.description: A unique name or ID for the object. Case sensitive.

opacity.description: Alpha value as a float in [0.0, 1.0]. Encoded as a decimal string because Lexicon lacks a float primitive.

originalSrc.description: Optional web url linking to the original source of the object.

text.description: The text to render. Cannot be purely whitespace.

style.description: Font style. Paragraph supports sans or serif.

size.description: Point size to render the text as a float > 0. Default 17.0. Encoded as a decimal string because Lexicon lacks a float primitive.

attributes.description: Styling attributes applied to ranges of the text (bold, italic, bold-italic).

text.description: The Text object renders text that dynamically resizes to fill its frame. Always centered. Best for 1-3 words.

opacity.description: Alpha value as a float in [0.0, 1.0]. Encoded as a decimal string because Lexicon lacks a float primitive.

text.description: The text to render. Cannot be purely whitespace.

style.description: Font style. Text supports a wider range of display faces than Paragraph.

wordWrap.description: Wrapping policy. `auto` lets the renderer decide; `manual` only wraps at explicit line breaks. Serialized as `word-wrap` in legacy bff.

padding.description: Padding (float >= 0) applied inside the frame while sizing the text. Default 20.0. Encoded as a decimal string because Lexicon lacks a float primitive.

link.description: A pressable object that redirects the viewer to another Byte or website.

opacity.description: Alpha value as a float in [0.0, 1.0]. Encoded as a decimal string because Lexicon lacks a float primitive.

url.description: Destination URL. Both `byte://` and `http(s)://` are supported. Use `byte://byte.{BYTE_ID}` to link to a Byte by id.

description.description: Short description of the destination content.

image.description: An inline PNG, JPEG, or BMP image.

opacity.description: Alpha value as a float in [0.0, 1.0]. Encoded as a decimal string because Lexicon lacks a float primitive.

src.description: The image asset (PNG, JPEG, or BMP).

scaleMode.description: How the image is resized inside its frame.

graphic.description: A monochromatic PNG that can be dynamically tinted. Always scales to fit its frame.

opacity.description: Alpha value as a float in [0.0, 1.0]. Encoded as a decimal string because Lexicon lacks a float primitive.
Alpha value as a float in [0.0, 1.0]. Encoded as a decimal string because Lexicon lacks a float primitive.

video.description: An inline MP4 video. Videos autoplay and loop on completion; 10 seconds or less is recommended.

opacity.description: Alpha value as a float in [0.0, 1.0]. Encoded as a decimal string because Lexicon lacks a float primitive.

muted.description: Whether the video should play with sound muted.

musicHit.description: A single note or drum hit inside a music beat.

time.description: Time offset in bars as a float >= 0. May be subdivided to half/quarter/8th/16th/32nd notes. Encoded as a decimal string because Lexicon lacks a float primitive.

bank.description: When `type` is 0, the instrument bank (e.g. bleep, meow, bass). When `type` is 1, always 'drums'.

note.description: When `type` is 0, a pitch like 'B/3' or 'C#/3' (A/-1 through G/8). When `type` is 1, a drum name like 'Kick' or 'Snare'.

duration.description: Duration in bars as a float > 0. Unsupported in current renderers; should be 1. Encoded as a decimal string because Lexicon lacks a float primitive.

musicBeat.description: A single beat of a music sequence. Wraps the hit array because Lexicon arrays cannot nest directly. The beat's position in `music.instructions` determines its point on the 4:4 timeline.

music.description: A MIDI-style sequence played by the Byte soundfont. Autoplays and loops. Only one music object is permitted per Byte.

opacity.description: Alpha value as a float in [0.0, 1.0]. Encoded as a decimal string because Lexicon lacks a float primitive.

bpm.description: Beats per minute. Must be greater than 0.

length.description: Length of the sequence in bars. Valid values are 2-16 and must be a multiple of 2.

instructions.description: The beats of the sequence. Length must be at least (length * 4).
